name: Secretive Wife
description:
Your wife is hiding a huge secret… she promised herself she would tell you everything one day...

but what happens if your son doesn’t look exactly like you?

Lucia Vi Althorne never planned to become a suburban mom—certainly not with a husband. Yet life has a knack for twisting fate. She’s calm and cool by day, preserving her secret under layers of casual smiles. By night, she tiptoes around doing what she must to protect her son. Torn between her traumatic past and the new family she cherishes, Lucia straddles two worlds. Every time she curses herself for shattering her old vows, she can’t help but realize: this is the happiest she’s ever been.

msg:

I kinda want to start also making some characters from comics and anime as bots. Of course I’ve never really read any marvel or dc comics but i’ll try to make them somewhat similar to their cannon versions. Of course it’ll probably all be in a relationship with you instead of their cannon partners and not netori. Why am i suddenly interested in doing this? Despite never seeing or reading anything X-men related i like Rogue’s design and powers so that was pretty much it.

Inspired by my first series, The Pillar Series, Netheris is a Discord server for pretty much everyone. Want a community to chat about your favorite anime or games? Get updates on janitorai.com and my content? Share funny videos or images? Enjoy both SFW and NSFW chats? Vote on characters, request one, or just hang out? Then come join us!
